# daytona_admin_snapshot_image_cleanup_status (Data Source)

Checks whether a Daytona snapshot image can be cleaned up through the Daytona admin API. This data source requires Daytona admin privileges.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_snapshot_image_cleanup_status" "example" {
  image_name = "registry.example.com/base:latest"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image_name` (String) Snapshot image name with tag to check.

### Read-Only

- `can_cleanup` (Boolean) Whether Daytona reports that the image can be cleaned up.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
